html:
2026-0334
2026-04-16FINCustoms TariffOrder Amending the Surtax on Imports of Certain Steel Goods Remission Order, 2025Order Amending the Surtax on Imports of Certain Steel Goods Remission Order, 2025 in order to (1) provide remission of the 50 percent surtax for eighty-four (84) types of imported steel goods for which there are no identified domestically produced alternatives; and (2) provide remission of the surtax paid or payable for subject steel goods imported into Canada or in transit to Canada on or before December 26, 2025.Registration: SOR/2026-0070 Publication Date: 2026-05-06
subject: Order Amending the Surtax on Imports of Certain Steel Goods Remission Order, 2025
precis: Order Amending the Surtax on Imports of Certain Steel Goods Remission Order, 2025 in order to (1) provide remission of the 50 percent surtax for eighty-four (84) types of imported steel goods for which there are no identified domestically produced alternatives; and (2) provide remission of the surtax paid or payable for subject steel goods imported into Canada or in transit to Canada on or before December 26, 2025.
